---
title: "Training Notes"
---

Python Foundation

Nov 2025 batch, Vikrant Patil

© Vikrant Patil

### Module I

- [Day 1](module1-day1.html)
- [Day 2](module1-day2.html)
- [Day 3](module1-day3.html)
- [Day 4](module1-day4.html)

### Module II

- [Day 1](module2-day1.html)
- [Day 2](module2-day2.html)
- [Day 3](module2-day3.html)
- [Day 4](module2-day4.html)	

### Module III

- [Day 1](module3-day1.html)
- [Day 2](module3-day2.html)
- [Day 3](module3-day3.html)
